_meta.coverage_note: Top 10 raw signals from SCEM sources — unanalysed

items.title: PRIO reports record 61 state-based conflicts in 2024, highest in 70+ years
items.summary: New PRIO data reveals 61 armed conflicts across 36 countries in 2024, with 129,000 battle deaths; Africa hardest hit with 28 conflicts.
items.domain_relevance: Signals surge in global armed conflicts, escalation trend

items.title: Pakistan signals aggressive retaliation to future Indian strikes
items.summary: Video analysis notes Pakistan warning of retaliation amid missile capabilities on both sides, heightening escalation risks.

items.title: China conducts large-scale military drills near Taiwan
items.summary: Report highlights China's ongoing drills as major flashpoint, risking rapid escalation in Taiwan Strait.

items.title: ACLED data: Europe now most intense conflict zone globally
items.summary: New ACLED figures show violence spreading fast in Europe, surpassing other regions in intensity.
items.domain_relevance: Escalation in European theatres per ACLED

items.title: Wikipedia logs 5,310+ fatalities in Arab-Israeli conflicts in 2026 YTD
items.summary: Ongoing Arab–Israeli/Iran–Israel conflicts record over 5,310 deaths in 2026 so far, including Gaza and Lebanon wars.
items.domain_relevance: High fatalities signal sustained Middle East escalation

items.title: 2026 Lebanon war listed as active in ongoing conflicts
items.summary: Wikipedia entry details 2026 Lebanon war within Israeli–Lebanese/Hezbollah conflict framework.
items.domain_relevance: New war initiation in Lebanon escalation

items.title: 2026 Iran war and Hormuz Strait crisis ongoing
items.summary: Conflicts include 2026 Iran war and Hormuz crisis amid broader Middle East proxy battles.

items.title: Crisis Group: 2025 bloody year, 2026 no better with Ukraine, Sudan fighting
items.summary: ICG notes continued raging battles in Ukraine, Sudan, Myanmar, Sahel into 2026.

items.title: ACLED Conflict Watchlist projects 10 top risk countries for 2026
items.summary: ACLED highlights 10 countries/regions facing heightened armed conflict and unrest.

items.title: Statista flags U.S.-Israel-Iran war as key 2026 conflict
items.summary: Statistics outline major 2026 conflicts including U.S.-Israel war with Iran, Russia-Ukraine.
